primary_function: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify typography choices avoid Inter, Roboto, and Arial
Confirm output includes working production-grade code
Ensure design has a clear, bold aesthetic direction
Validate presence of distinctive visual elements
Confirm color palette uses CSS variables for consistency
Ensure layout breaks conventional grid patterns
Verify backgrounds include atmospheric effects beyond solid colors
Confirm code complexity matches aesthetic ambition level
